payload.answer: I’m not confident which “Sam” this note refers to. Please choose how to handle it.
repair_options: Ask the user to clarify which Sam the note is about before saving anything.
Save nothing for now and wait for a more specific note.
Treat this as a new separate Sam-related memory only if the user confirms the exact person.
Show the user possible existing Sam entries, if available, and ask them to pick one or choose “new Sam.”
